home.hero_desc: OrangeLabs delivers next-generation AI agent technology that transforms how enterprises automate, manage, and scale their operations.
home.problem_title: Economic Losses from IT Failures in Enterprises & Public Institutions
home.problem_stat_label: Estimated 3-year losses in the financial sector
home.problem_desc: IT incidents in the financial sector continue to rise. Existing solutions lack dedicated endpoint performance and fault analysis capabilities. IT admins receive countless queries about PC slowdowns and failures, yet have no systematic solution.
home.problem_p2: A solution that detects IT problems in real-time and automatically analyzes root causes is essential.
home.p1_desc: Rapid detection and root cause analysis, real-time performance monitoring, and fast incident resolution to maximize IT operational efficiency.
home.p2_desc: Precise root cause analysis with reliable analytical data, and accurate understanding of S/W and H/W impact relationships.
home.p3_desc: Flexible widget-based configuration, real-time 1:1 & 1:N remote commands, and low-load architecture design for stable system operations.
home.kf1_desc: 24/7 monitoring with a flexible widget-based dashboard configurable per department and role.
home.kf2_desc: View CPU, Memory, I/O, and Handle load by day and month in graph format. Query performance at any point in time.
home.kf3_desc: Detect abnormal terminations, CPU spikes, and BSODs with AI-powered root cause analysis.
home.kf4_desc: View symptoms and users by day/hour at a glance. Events, symptom types, and root causes displayed separately.
home.kf5_desc: Execute 1:N commands across all enterprise PCs. Remotely operate Windows CMD in real-time.
home.kf6_desc: Real-time symptom analysis and resolution via AI. ML-based failure prediction and software collision impact analysis.
home.partners_desc: Leading enterprises and public institutions in Korea
home.cta_desc: See what true endpoint visibility looks like with a live demo of Orange The Client.

agent.title: Agent
agent.desc: An autonomous AI agent that understands your goals and executes complex workflows end-to-end — without constant human supervision.
agent.cap1_desc: Interprets complex instructions and converts them into actionable steps.
agent.cap2_desc: Chains multiple tasks together to complete end-to-end processes autonomously.
agent.cap3_desc: Adjusts its behavior dynamically based on live data and changing conditions.
agent.cap4_desc: Runs in isolated environments to prevent unauthorized data access.
agent.cap5_desc: Connects seamlessly with your existing tools, APIs, and data sources.
agent.cap6_desc: Full logging of every action taken for compliance and debugging.
agent.cta_title: Ready to deploy your first Agent?
agent.cta_desc: Connect with our team to get started with a proof of concept for your use case.

manager.title: Manager
manager.desc: The command center for your entire AI agent ecosystem. Observe, control, and optimize every automation from one powerful dashboard.
manager.feat1_desc: Monitor all agents, tasks, and workflows from a single unified interface.
manager.feat2_desc: Fine-grained permissions to control who can view, edit, or deploy agents.
manager.feat3_desc: Live status updates, performance metrics, and alert notifications.
manager.feat4_desc: Visual drag-and-drop editor for designing complex automation pipelines.
manager.feat5_desc: Pre-built integrations with major enterprise data sources and cloud services.
manager.feat6_desc: Detailed reports on agent performance, cost, and business impact.
manager.cta_desc: See how Manager can streamline operations across your organization.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.desc: Welcome to the OrangeLabs documentation. This guide will help you get started with Orange The Client — our AI-powered automation platform.
introduction.sec1_desc: Orange The Client is an enterprise AI automation platform comprising two main components: Agent and Manager. Agent handles autonomous task execution, while Manager provides centralized control and visibility.
introduction.sec2_desc: At the core of Orange The Client are Agents — autonomous AI processes that interpret instructions and execute multi-step tasks. Agents are managed through the Manager dashboard, which provides real-time monitoring, workflow configuration, and analytics.
introduction.sec3_desc: To get started, contact our sales team to provision your environment. Once set up, you'll have access to the Manager dashboard where you can configure and deploy your first Agent in minutes.
introduction.sec4_desc: Orange The Client follows a hub-and-spoke architecture. The Manager acts as the central hub, orchestrating multiple Agents (spokes) that operate independently in sandboxed environments while reporting back to the Manager.

userManual.title: User Manual
userManual.desc: Comprehensive guide for using the Orange The Client platform.

blog.title: Tech Blog
blog.desc: Engineering insights, product updates, and industry perspectives from the OrangeLabs team.

about.hero_desc: OrangeLabs develops endpoint performance and fault management systems that meet the standards of enterprise IT administrators — solving problems that security products alone cannot.
about.mission_title: What Every IT Admin Needs — But Security Products Can't Solve
about.mission_p1: Administrative PCs rely on many government-dedicated programs. Service failures caused by software conflicts or Windows patches are common — and far more frequent than security incidents.
about.mission_p2: If endpoint data could help identify root causes of failures, it would be enormously valuable for IT operations. That insight is what drove the founding of OrangeLabs.
about.product_bullet1: Kernel-level event-driven data collection — no polling lag
about.product_bullet2: Real-time anomaly detection across all endpoints simultaneously
about.product_bullet3: AI-powered BSOD and crash dump analysis
about.product_tagline: Next-generation endpoint performance and fault management solution powered by AI
about.group_desc: Four group companies collaborate organically to deliver complete services — from product development to sales, security consulting, and maintenance.
about.group_c1_desc: IT comprehensive consulting & construction, sole distributor of The Client (domestic & international)
about.group_c2_desc: New solution R&D, The Client manufacturer
about.group_c3_desc: Security specialized consulting & construction, The Client security advisory
about.group_c4_desc: Nationwide maintenance, The Client maintenance support
about.ceo_desc: Designed the structure of endpoint performance and fault management solutions that enterprise IT administrators need, and founded OrangeLabs.
about.arch_sub: From hardware to console — complete coverage at every level of your endpoint environment.
about.arch1_desc: Direct hardware-level telemetry — CPU, memory, I/O, network adapters
about.arch2_desc: Proprietary Orange Kernel Driver captures OS events in real time without polling
about.arch3_desc: Lightweight always-on agent with process lineage tracking (SUID) and policy enforcement
about.arch4_desc: Unified management console for cross-endpoint correlation, dashboards, and remote control
about.cap_title: What Orange The Client Can Do
about.cap1_desc: Event-driven collection at the OS kernel level using our proprietary Kernel Driver — true real-time, not polling-based.
about.cap2_desc: Automatic BSOD and application crash dump collection with AI-driven root cause analysis across all endpoints.
about.cap3_desc: Unique SUID-based process identification tracks every process lifecycle and execution lineage across your fleet.
about.cap4_desc: Aggregate, compare, and correlate events — from Windows Updates to security incidents — across your entire fleet simultaneously.
about.cap5_desc: Real-time 1:1 and 1:N remote command execution directly on target endpoints without requiring admin privileges.
about.cap6_desc: Built for GDPR, CCPA, and Korean Personal Information Protection Act compliance from the ground up.
about.vp1_desc: Reduce IT operational overhead by automating endpoint monitoring, anomaly detection, and incident response workflows.
about.vp2_desc: Accelerate incident resolution with real-time data, AI-driven root cause analysis, and instant remote command execution.
about.vp3_desc: Elevate your IT support quality with proactive monitoring, pre-collected crash data, and granular endpoint intelligence.
about.cta_title: Ready to see it in action?
about.cta_desc: Get a live demo of Orange The Client and discover what true endpoint visibility looks like.

otc.hero_desc: Next-generation endpoint performance and fault management solution powered by AI. From real-time detection to AI-driven root cause analysis — elevating IT convenience and stability.
otc.problem_title: Economic Losses from IT Failures in Enterprises & Public Institutions
otc.problem_desc: IT incidents in the financial sector continue to rise. Existing solutions lack dedicated endpoint performance and fault analysis capabilities. IT admins receive countless queries about PC slowdowns and failures, yet have no systematic solution.
otc.problem_p2: A solution that detects IT problems in real-time and automatically analyzes root causes is essential.
otc.arch_desc: Agent, Manager, Kernel, and Console are always connected over the network in a low-load collection architecture. Applicable to Premise, On-Premise, and Cloud environments.
otc.arch1_desc: Installed on all endpoints — desktops, laptops, ATMs, kiosks — to collect real-time event data.
otc.arch2_desc: Collects process, file, and network data at the OS kernel level using event-driven architecture. Zero polling overhead.
otc.arch3_desc: Central server that aggregates real-time data from agents and performs ML-based anomaly detection.
otc.arch4_desc: Unified management UI for administrators to monitor all endpoints and execute remote commands.
otc.f1_desc: 24/7 monitoring with a flexible widget-based dashboard, configurable per department and role.
otc.f2_desc: View CPU, Memory, I/O, and Handle load by day, month, and graph format. Query performance at any point in time.
otc.f3_desc: Detect abnormal termination, forced closure, CPU spikes, and BSODs — with AI-powered root cause analysis by symptom type, user, frequency, and date.
otc.f4_desc: View symptoms and users by day/hour. Events, symptom types, and root causes are displayed separately.
otc.f5_desc: Execute 1:N commands across all enterprise PCs. Remotely operate Windows CMD in real-time for any targeted endpoint.
otc.f6_desc: Real-time symptom analysis and resolution recommendations via AI. Supports ML-based failure prediction and software collision impact analysis.
otc.impact_title: How Incident Response Time Changes After Deployment
otc.impact_r2_note: Instant visibility of scope and targets
otc.compare_key_desc: No competitor uses machine learning and AI-based technology to predict failures.
otc.cta_desc: See what true endpoint visibility looks like with a live demo of Orange The Client.
